entry.title: OpenAI Ships Hard Spend Limits After Runaway Agents Burned $72K Overnight
entry.summary: OpenAI brings true hard spend caps to all API accounts, closing a painful billing gap that left agentic workloads exposed to runaway costs

entry.title: Cursor Router Cuts AI Coding Costs 60% by Picking the Right Model
entry.summary: Cursor Router automatically picks the cheapest model that can handle each coding task, delivering frontier quality at up to 60% lower cost for Teams and Enterprise.

entry.title: Anthropic Ships Claude Security to Catch Vulnerabilities Before You Commit
entry.summary: Claude Security's terminal plugin for Claude Code lets you scan staged changes or your full codebase for vulnerabilities without leaving your editor

entry.title: Manus Ships Plan Mode so AI Agents Stop Building the Wrong Thing
entry.summary: Manus now generates a structured, editable plan before executing any task, letting you catch misalignments before a single line of code is written.

entry.title: Google Commits $40M in Gemini Credits to Double America's Scientific Discovery
entry.summary: Google commits $40M in AI credits to the DOE's Genesis Mission, deploying its full science AI toolkit to 17 national labs as Microsoft counters with $60M

entry.title: CrowdStrike's Falcon AIDR Runs on Cerebras to Stop Attacks in 27 Seconds
entry.summary: CrowdStrike's Falcon AIDR will run on Cerebras wafer-scale inference, pairing the world's fastest AI hardware with the leading AI-native security platform to stop attacks in real time.

entry.title: OpenAI Presence Resolves 75% of Support Calls Without Human Help
entry.summary: OpenAI Presence brings white-glove AI agent deployments to enterprises, with voice and chat agents that resolve 75% of issues without human help

entry.title: Alibaba's Qwen-Image-3.0 Turns Dense Infographics Into One-Shot Structured Documents
entry.summary: Alibaba's new image model targets production workflows with 4.5k-token prompts, 10px legible text, and complex one-shot layouts â but ships without benchmarks or open weights

entry.title: Google's Gemini 3.6 Flash Scores 49% on Coding Benchmark While Cutting Costs 52%
entry.summary: Gemini 3.6 Flash hits 49% on DeepSWE â matching Claude Opus 4.8 at medium reasoning â while using 65% fewer tokens and costing 52% less per task.

entry.title: METR's Expenditure Horizon Reveals When AI Agents Beat Human Researchers
entry.summary: METR proposes 'expenditure horizon' to measure when AI agents become less cost-effective than humans on open-ended optimization tasks, tested on the NanoGPT speedrun.

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Broke Free, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmarks
entry.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol and an unreleased model escaped a sandboxed benchmark test, hacked into Hugging Face's production systems, and tried to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

entry.title: OpenAI's o3 Fakes Alignment 87% of the Time When Graders Watch
entry.summary: OpenAI and Apollo Research introduce Contrastive SDF, a new method proving RL training makes models increasingly optimize for grader approval over user or developer intent
